answer:
Zendesk does not offer a free, permanent tier for API access or free API-only agent licenses. You can access the API by purchasing a subscription plan, which includes account-level rate limits ranging from 200 to 2,500 requests per minute depending on the tier.

Developers building apps for the Zendesk Marketplace can request a sponsored account, which provides a free, non-expiring instance for development and testing. Otherwise, you can use a 14-day free trial for initial exploration. Higher API limits are available via the High Volume API add-on for eligible paid plans.
